mapper.select: SELECT o.`id` , o.`code` , d.`delivered_at` , o.`total_amount` , o.`status` FROM `orders` o JOIN `delivery` d ON o.`delivery_id` = d.`id` WHERE o.`franchise_id` = #{franchiseId} AND o.`user_id` = #{userId} AND o.`status` = 'DELIVERED' AND d.delivered_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

SELECT po.`id` AS id , po.`product_id` , po.`order_id` , po.`quantity` , o.`code` AS orderCode , p.`code` AS productCode , p.`name` AS productName , p.`sale_price` , p.`unit` , p.`spec` , pg.`name` AS productGroupName , pt.`name` AS productTypeName , pa.`name` AS productAttributeName FROM `product_order` po JOIN `orders` o ON po.`order_id` = o.`id` JOIN `product` p ON po.`product_id` = p.`id` LEFT JOIN `product_group` pg ON p.`product_group_id` = pg.`id` LEFT JOIN `product_type` pt ON p.`product_type_id` = pt.`id` LEFT JOIN `product_attribute` pa ON p.`product_attribute_id` = pa.`id` WHERE o.`franchise_id` = #{franchiseId} AND o.`user_id` = #{userId} AND po.`order_id` = #{orderId}

SELECT -- 가맹점 정보 f.name AS franchiseName , f.code AS franchiseCode , f.business_number AS businessNumber , u.name AS ceoName , f.signed_at AS franchiseSignedAt , f.address AS franchiseAddress , f.address_detail AS franchiseAddressDetail , f.zipcode AS zipCode , f.phone AS franchisePhone
-- 반품 정보 , r.code AS returnCode , r.created_at , r.status , r.total_amount , r.description , CASE WHEN r.status = 'REJECTED' THEN r.rejected_reason ELSE NULL END AS rejectedReason
-- 배송 정보 , d.delivery_company AS deliveryCompany , d.name AS driverName , d.phone AS driverPhone , d.tracking_number AS trackingNumber , DATE(d.delivered_at) AS deliveredAt
-- 결재 정보 , a_sub.code AS approvalCode , u3.name AS approvalRequester , DATE(a_sub.created_at) AS approvalRequestedAt , a_sub.status AS approvalStatus , DATE(a_sub.processed_at) AS approvalCompletedAt
FROM `return` r JOIN franchise f ON r.franchise_id = f.id JOIN user u ON f.owner_id = u.id LEFT JOIN delivery d ON r.delivery_id = d.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.*, ra.return_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ra.return_id ORDER BY a.created_at DESC) AS rn FROM return_approval ra JOIN approval a ON a.id = ra.approval_id AND a.degree = ra.approval_degree ) a_sub ON a_sub.return_id = r.id AND a_sub.rn = 1
LEFT JOIN user u3 ON a_sub.user_id = u3.id
WHERE r.id = #{returnId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM hq_user_detail h WHERE h.department_id = f.department_id AND h.user_id = #{userId} )

SELECT -- 가맹점 정보 f.name AS franchiseName , f.code AS franchiseCode , f.business_number AS businessNumber , u.name AS ceoName , f.signed_at AS franchiseSignedAt , f.address AS franchiseAddress , f.address_detail AS franchiseAddressDetail , f.zipcode AS zipCode , f.phone AS franchisePhone
-- 반품 정보 , r.code AS returnCode , r.created_at , r.status , r.total_amount , r.description , CASE WHEN r.status = 'REJECTED' THEN r.rejected_reason ELSE NULL END AS rejectedReason
-- 배송 정보 , d.delivery_company AS deliveryCompany , d.name AS driverName , d.phone AS driverPhone , d.tracking_number AS trackingNumber , DATE(d.delivered_at) AS deliveredAt
FROM `return` r JOIN franchise f ON r.franchise_id = f.id JOIN user u ON f.owner_id = u.id LEFT JOIN delivery d ON r.delivery_id = d.id
WHERE r.id = #{returnId} AND f.`owner_id` = #{userId}
SELECT rf.id , rf.name , rf.url FROM return_file rf WHERE rf.return_id = #{returnId}

SELECT r.code , r.status , r.created_at AS createdAt , r.total_amount AS totalAmount , r.description FROM `return` r JOIN franchise f ON f.id = r.franchise_id JOIN user u ON u.id = f.manager_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND r.status = 'REVIEW_COMPLETED' ORDER BY r.created_at
